topics.title: Types and Components of Computer Systems
topics.description: Hardware and software, analogue and digital data, the CPU and internal memory, RAM and ROM, operating systems and interfaces, and the impact of emerging technologies.

topics.title: Input, Output, and Storage Devices
topics.description: Input devices, direct data entry devices, output devices, and the characteristics, uses, advantages, and disadvantages of magnetic, optical, and solid-state storage.

topics.title: Networks and Applications of ICT
topics.description: Network devices and types (LAN, WLAN, WAN), data-transfer security, health issues from IT use, and applications such as banking, medicine, retail, expert systems, and recognition systems.

topics.title: System Development and Security
topics.description: The systems development life cycle, testing and implementation, documentation, physical safety, eSafety, data protection, threats to data, and copyright.

topics.title: Document Management, Processing and Productivity Tools
topics.description: File management and formats, editing images, creating and formatting documents and tables, applying styles and a house style, proofing, and creating charts (Paper 2 practical).

topics.title: Advanced Data Handling and Web Development Techniques
topics.description: Databases and relationships, presentations with master slides, spreadsheet models and functions, and the three web development layers with HTML and CSS (Paper 2 practical).
